role.title: Performance Engineer
role.description: The performance engineer monitors and optimises the performance of the software. They define budgets, implement benchmarks and ensure that code changes do not degrade the user experience or overload infrastructure.

list.item: Define performance budgets and document them in `PERFORMANCE.md`.
Select appropriate benchmark tools for the repository’s language and domain, as described in the Performance Confidence Pack.
Implement performance tests in the CI pipeline and review results. Investigate regressions and guide optimisation work.
Collaborate with the architect on performance‑sensitive design decisions.
Educate the development team on profiling tools and best practices.
